title: Velvety Citrusy Date Pilaf
description: This date-night dish combines velvety dates with a citrusy twist for a raw-friendly treat that's perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of white bread crumbs
ingredients.notes: ensure they are raw and not toasted

ingredients.name: 2 dates, pitted and sliced
ingredients.notes: adjust quantity based on desired consistency

instructions: Combine bread crumbs and juice from both citrus fruits in a bowl.
Add dates and parsley, mix well until evenly distributed.
Transfer mixture into a baking dish and bake for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Garnish with extra parsley if desired before serving.
